CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. MARINA C. TSATALIS, Esq. and ALISON GENOVA, Esq. of Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati (Yel: 650-493-9300) for defendants Grubmarket, Inc. and Bryan Barsness;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS BRYAN BARSNESS , AN INDIVIDUAL, AND GRUBMARKET, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

The Court inquires of attorney Alison Genova as to whether she is in good standing in all the courts to which she has been admitted, and as to how many California pro hac vice applications she has had granted within the past two years.

The Court rules as follows: Defendants' motion to admit attorney Alison Genova as counsel pro hac vice is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRYAN BARSNESS,AND GRUBMARKET, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Off Calender. The Tsatalis declaration fails to show parties met and conferred in person, by phone, or by video conference, as required by CCP 435.5. Parties are ordered to comply with the Code. Responsive pleadings are now due by October 7, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
